html:
Exclusive to:  

For the Don't Starve Together item with a similar function, see Boat Patch.

The Boat Repair Kit is a craftable Item can be used to repair Boats in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is crafted using 2 Boards, 2 Stingers, and 2 Ropes. It requires the Science Machine to prototype and can be found in the Nautical Tab.

A Boat Repair Kit can be obtained early in the game by destroying the large piece of Debris at the player's spawn with a Hammer.

Upon use, it recovers 100 regardless of what boat it is used on. It can be used 3 times before being completely consumed. The Boat Repair Kit can be used while on the boat by right clicking on the Kit. It can also be used without getting on to the boat by dragging it on to the boat from dry land.

Downloadable Content

The Boat Repair kit is also present in the Hamlet DLC.

Trivia

  • The ability to craft Boat Repair Kit in the Hamlet DLC was introduced in the June 7, 2019 update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Fix it stuff”
–Wormwood
“Swell. Because cork is known for its durability.”
–Wheeler
The Boat Repair Kit is a craftable Item can be used to repair Boats in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is crafted using 2 Boards, 2 Stingers, and 2 Ropes. It requires the Science Machine to prototype and can be found in the Nautical Tab.
A Boat Repair Kit can be obtained early in the game by destroying the large piece of Debris at the player's spawn with a Hammer.
Upon use, it recovers 100 regardless of what boat it is used on. It can be used 3 times before being completely consumed. The Boat Repair Kit can be used while on the boat by right clicking on the Kit. It can also be used without getting on to the boat by dragging it on to the boat from dry land.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
The Boat Repair kit is also present in the Hamlet DLC.

The '''Boat Repair Kit''' is a craftable [[Item]] can be used to repair [[Boats]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is crafted using 2 [[Boards]], 2 [[Stinger]]s, and 2 [[Rope]]s. It requires the [[Science Machine]] to prototype and can be found in the [[Nautical Tab]].

A Boat Repair Kit can be obtained early in the game by destroying the large piece of [[Debris]] at the player's spawn with a [[Hammer]].

Upon use, it recovers 100 {{Pic24|Boat Meter (SW)|Boats}} regardless of what boat it is used on. It can be used 3 times before being completely consumed. The Boat Repair Kit can be used while on the boat by right clicking on the Kit. It can also be used without getting on to the boat by dragging it on to the boat from dry land.

== {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
The Boat Repair kit is also present in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == 
* The ability to craft Boat Repair Kit in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC was introduced in the June 7, 2019 update.
